FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V,
 (
 select  TRANSACTION_DIST_ID ,
APPLICATION_ID ,TRANSACTION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V
 minus
 select  TRANSACTION_DIST_ID ,
APPLICATION_ID ,TRANSACTION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.APPLICATION_ID = STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V.APPLICATION_ID and ACM.TRANSACTION_ID=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V.TRANSACTION_ID
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V.REFRESH_DATETIME 
  and ACM.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_DIST_V.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V)
